Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Understand the Goal The user wants a process tree representation of a complex hospital patient management scenario using specific operators and leaf nodes

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Deconstruct the Process Description break down the scenario stepbystep and map it to process tree operators Step 1 sequence A RG IA Step 2 sequence TI TC combined sequence A RG IA TI TC

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Step 3 Exclusive choice between CE and FBP XOR CE FBP Combined so far sequence A RG IA TI TC X CE FBP

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Step 4 Loop for abnormal results if abnormal loop commences A do part sequence SC X TM SPT X FCE FBA B tau Loop sequence SC treatment XOR rediag XOR tau

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Verify loop structure matches prompt semantics A executed then exit or B then A again execution do SC TM SPT FCE FBA check exit if not tau repeat matches returns to Specialist Consultation until normal

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Step 5 parallel AI NC Step 6 sequence FAS DDI Step 7 parallel BL ICP MRF assemble full tree root sequence with all parts

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Use nary notation for main sequence as standard in pm4py and process mining flat sequence for readability can be nested binary

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Double check step 4 loop description RDT as X FCE FBA self correction refinement check semantics parent pointers tau representation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Verify structure against prompt steps all match Python code parents set children appended operators correct labels match activities tau used
